narrative:
Anderson Twp. township has 35,057 registered voters, with 52.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 30.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 13.6 percentage points.
